lines.gurmukhi: ਖਾਧਾ ਹੋਇ ਸੁਆਹ ਭੀ ਖਾਣੇ ਸਿਉ ਦੋਸਤੀ ॥
lines.translit: khaadhaa hoe suaah bhee khaane siau dosatee |
lines.english: That which is eaten becomes dust, but they are still attached to eating.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੀਜੈ ਮੁਹੀ ਗਿਰਾਹ ਭੁਖ ਤਿਖਾ ਦੁਇ ਭਉਕੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: teejai muhee giraah bhukh tikhaa due bhaukeea |
lines.english: In the third watch, both hunger and thirst bark for attention, and food is put into the mouth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੀ ਉਠਿ ਰਚਿਓਨੁ ਵਾਦੁ ਸੈ ਵਰੑਿਆ ਕੀ ਪਿੜ ਬਧੀ ॥
lines.translit: bhee utth rachion vaad sai varaiaa kee pirr badhee |
lines.english: Rising up again, they engage in conflicts; they set the stage as if they will live for 100 years.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਉਥੈ ਆਈ ਊਂਘ ਅਖੀ ਮੀਟਿ ਪਵਾਰਿ ਗਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: chauthai aaee aoongh akhee meett pavaar geaa |
lines.english: In the fourth watch, they become drowsy. They close their eyes and begin to dream.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਸਚਾ ਨਾਵਣੁ ਹੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak saahib man vasai sachaa naavan hoe |1|
lines.english: -O Nanak, the Lord dwells within their minds, and their cleansing bath is true. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 2 |
lines.english: Second Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੇ ਵੇਲਾ ਵਖਤ ਸਭਿ ਜੇ ਅਠੀ ਭਉ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: sabhe velaa vakhat sabh je atthee bhau hoe |
lines.english: If at all times, at each and every moment, they live in the fear of God

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਈ ਪੂਰੇ ਸਾਹ ਜਿਨੀ ਪੂਰਾ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: seee poore saah jinee pooraa paaeaa |
lines.english: They are the perfect kings, who have found the Perfect Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਠੀ ਵੇਪਰਵਾਹ ਰਹਨਿ ਇਕਤੈ ਰੰਗਿ ॥
lines.translit: atthee veparavaah rehan ikatai rang |
lines.english: Twenty-four hours a day, they remain unconcerned, imbued with the Love of the One Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਰਸਨਿ ਰੂਪਿ ਅਥਾਹ ਵਿਰਲੇ ਪਾਈਅਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: darasan roop athaah virale paaeeeh |
lines.english: Only a few obtain the Darshan, the Blessed Vision of the Unimaginably Beauteous Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਪੂਰਾ ਜੇ ਕਰੇ ਘਟੈ ਨਾਹੀ ਤੋਲੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak pooraa je kare ghattai naahee tol |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, when the Guru makes one perfect, one's weight does not decrease. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਤੂੰ ਤਾ ਕਿਆ ਹੋਰਿ ਮੈ ਸਚੁ ਸੁਣਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: jaa toon taa kiaa hor mai sach sunaaeeai |
lines.english: When You are with me, what more could I want? I speak only the Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਮਿ ਪੂਰੈ ਪੂਰਾ ਗੁਰੂ ਪੂਰਾ ਜਾ ਕਾ ਬੋਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: karam poorai pooraa guroo pooraa jaa kaa bol |
lines.english: Through the perfect karma of good deeds, one meets the Perfect Guru, whose speech is perfect.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਨੈ ਚਿਤਿ ਕਠੋਰਿ ਸੇਵ ਗਵਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: enai chit katthor sev gavaaeeai |
lines.english: Being so stone-hearted, she has lost her chance to serve the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁਠੀ ਧੰਧੈ ਚੋਰਿ ਮਹਲੁ ਨ ਪਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: mutthee dhandhai chor mehal na paaeeai |
lines.english: Plundered by the thieves of worldly affairs, she does not obtain the Mansion of His Presence.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਉ ਕਰਿ ਪੂਰੈ ਵਟਿ ਤੋਲਿ ਤੁਲਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: kiau kar poorai vatt tol tulaaeeai |
lines.english: How can she be weighed accurately, upon the scale of perfection?

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਤੁ ਘਟਿ ਸਚੁ ਨ ਪਾਇ ਸੁ ਭੰਨਿ ਘੜਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: jit ghatt sach na paae su bhan gharraaeeai |
lines.english: That heart, in which the True Lord is not found, should be torn down and re-built.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਇ ਨ ਆਖੈ ਘਟਿ ਹਉਮੈ ਜਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: koe na aakhai ghatt haumai jaaeeai |
lines.english: No one will say that her weight has been shorted, if she rids herself of egotism.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਈਅਨਿ ਖਰੇ ਪਰਖਿ ਦਰਿ ਬੀਨਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: leean khare parakh dar beenaaeeai |
lines.english: The genuine are assayed, and accepted in the Court of the All-knowing Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਉਦਾ ਇਕਤੁ ਹਟਿ ਪੂਰੈ ਗੁਰਿ ਪਾਈਐ ॥੧੭॥
lines.translit: saudaa ikat hatt poorai gur paaeeai |17|
lines.english: The genuine merchandise is found only in one shop-it is obtained from the Perfect Guru. ||17||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੨ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 2 |
lines.english: Salok, Second Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਵਿਚਿ ਨਉ ਨਿਧਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਏਕੁ ਭਾਲਹਿ ਗੁਣੀ ਗਹੀਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: tis vich nau nidh naam ek bhaaleh gunee gaheer |
lines.english: Within the body are the nine treasures of the Name of the Lord-seek the depths of these virtues.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਠੀ ਪਹਰੀ ਅਠ ਖੰਡ ਨਾਵਾ ਖੰਡੁ ਸਰੀਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: atthee paharee atth khandd naavaa khandd sareer |
lines.english: Twenty-four hours a day, destroy the eight things, and in the ninth place, conquer the body.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਮਵੰਤੀ ਸਾਲਾਹਿਆ ਨਾਨਕ ਕਰਿ ਗੁਰੁ ਪੀਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: karamavantee saalaahiaa naanak kar gur peer |
lines.english: Those blessed with the karma of good actions praise the Lord. O Nanak, they make the Guru their spiritual teacher.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਉਥੈ ਪਹਰਿ ਸਬਾਹ ਕੈ ਸੁਰਤਿਆ ਉਪਜੈ ਚਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: chauthai pehar sabaah kai suratiaa upajai chaau |
lines.english: In the fourth watch of the early morning hours, a longing arises in their higher consciousness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨਾ ਦਰੀਆਵਾ ਸਿਉ ਦੋਸਤੀ ਮਨਿ ਮੁਖਿ ਸਚਾ ਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: tinaa dareeaavaa siau dosatee man mukh sachaa naau |
lines.english: They are attuned to the river of life; the True Name is in their minds and on their lips.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਥੈ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਵੰਡੀਐ ਕਰਮੀ ਹੋਇ ਪਸਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: othai amrit vanddeeai karamee hoe pasaau |
lines.english: The Ambrosial Nectar is distributed, and those with good karma receive this gift.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੰਚਨ ਕਾਇਆ ਕਸੀਐ ਵੰਨੀ ਚੜੈ ਚੜਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kanchan kaaeaa kaseeai vanee charrai charraau |
lines.english: Their bodies become golden, and take on the color of spirituality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਹੋਵੈ ਨਦਰਿ ਸਰਾਫ ਕੀ ਬਹੁੜਿ ਨ ਪਾਈ ਤਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: je hovai nadar saraaf kee bahurr na paaee taau |
lines.english: If the Jeweller casts His Glance of Grace, they are not placed in the fire again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤੀ ਪਹਰੀ ਸਤੁ ਭਲਾ ਬਹੀਐ ਪੜਿਆ ਪਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: satee paharee sat bhalaa baheeai parriaa paas |
lines.english: Throughout the other seven watches of the day, it is good to speak the Truth, and sit with the spiritually wise.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਥੈ ਪਾਪੁ ਪੁੰਨੁ ਬੀਚਾਰੀਐ ਕੂੜੈ ਘਟੈ ਰਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: othai paap pun beechaareeai koorrai ghattai raas |
lines.english: There, vice and virtue are distinguished, and the capital of falsehood is decreased.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਥੈ ਖੋਟੇ ਸਟੀਅਹਿ ਖਰੇ ਕੀਚਹਿ ਸਾਬਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: othai khotte satteeeh khare keecheh saabaas |
lines.english: There, the counterfeit are cast aside, and the genuine are cheered.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉਣੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਪਾਣੀ ਪਿਤਾ ਮਾਤਾ ਧਰਤਿ ਮਹਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: paun guroo paanee pitaa maataa dharat mehat |
lines.english: Air is the Guru, Water is the Father, and Earth is the Great Mother of all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੋਲਣੁ ਫਾਦਲੁ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਦੁਖੁ ਸੁਖੁ ਖਸਮੈ ਪਾਸਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: bolan faadal naanakaa dukh sukh khasamai paas |1|
lines.english: Speech is vain and useless. O Nanak, pain and pleasure are in the power of our Lord and Master. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 2 |
lines.english: Second Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਚੰਗਿਆਈਆ ਬੁਰਿਆਈਆ ਵਾਚੇ ਧਰਮੁ ਹਦੂਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: changiaaeea buriaaeea vaache dharam hadoor |
lines.english: Good deeds and bad deeds-the record is read out in the Presence of the Lord of Dharma.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਿਨਸੁ ਰਾਤਿ ਦੁਇ ਦਾਈ ਦਾਇਆ ਖੇਲੈ ਸਗਲ ਜਗਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: dinas raat due daaee daaeaa khelai sagal jagat |
lines.english: Day and night are the two nurses, in whose lap all the world is at play.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਮੀ ਆਪੋ ਆਪਣੀ ਕੇ ਨੇੜੈ ਕੇ ਦੂਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: karamee aapo aapanee ke nerrai ke door |
lines.english: According to their own actions, some are drawn closer, and some are driven farther away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੀ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇਆ ਗਏ ਮਸਕਤਿ ਘਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: jinee naam dhiaaeaa ge masakat ghaal |
lines.english: Those who have meditated on the Naam, the Name of the Lord, and departed after having worked by the sweat of their brow

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਭੋਜਨੁ ਭਾਉ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਦਸਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: sachaa bhojan bhaau satigur dasiaa |
lines.english: The True Food is the Love of the Lord; the True Guru has spoken.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤੇ ਮੁਖ ਉਜਲੇ ਹੋਰ ਕੇਤੀ ਛੁਟੀ ਨਾਲਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak te mukh ujale hor ketee chhuttee naal |2|
lines.english: -O Nanak, their faces are radiant in the Court of the Lord, and many others are saved along with them! ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਤੁਠੈ ਨਾਉ ਪ੍ਰੇਮਿ ਰਹਸਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: satigur tutthai naau prem rahasiaa |
lines.english: When the True Guru is pleased, one receives the Lord's Name, and blossoms forth in His Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੈ ਕੋਟਿ ਗਿਰਾਂਇ ਨਿਜ ਘਰਿ ਵਸਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: sachai kott giraane nij ghar vasiaa |
lines.english: True are the cities and the villages, where one abides in the True Home of the self.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੇ ਹੀ ਪਤੀਆਇ ਸਚਿ ਵਿਗਸਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: sache hee pateeae sach vigasiaa |
lines.english: With this True Food, I am satisfied, and with the Truth, I am delighted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਝੂਠੋ ਝੂਠੁ ਵਖਾਣਿ ਸੁ ਮਹਲੁ ਖੁਆਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: jhoottho jhootth vakhaan su mehal khuaaeeai |
lines.english: By uttering falsehood and only falsehood, the Mansion of the Lord's Presence is lost.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੈ ਦੈ ਦੀਬਾਣਿ ਕੂੜਿ ਨ ਜਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: sachai dai deebaan koorr na jaaeeai |
lines.english: No one enters the Court of the True Lord through falsehood.
